name: Sammy Figueroa
abstract: Sammy Figueroa (born November 16, 1948) is an American percussionist of Puerto Rican descent. At 18, he joined the band of bassist Bobby Valentín and also co-led the Brazilian-Latin fusion group Raíces.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Jazz Band: Bernstein in Jazz
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: West Side Story: I Feel Pretty

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: really researched and studied with Sammy Figueroa who was in the Brecker Brothers... Sammy Figueroa was the percussionist... So I played this conga part
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
